name: Rokid-Scribe
summary: Capture voice notes on glasses, transcribe on phone, export as TXT or PDF.
description: Record voice notes directly on Rokid glasses. Import them to the phone over Wi-Fi LAN or Bluetooth SPP. Transcribe locally with ElevenLabs, AssemblyAI, Speechmatics, Deepgram, or Groq. Export as TXT or PDF.
author: Anezium
